name: Laura Brown
soapS: Patient reports occasional headaches; denies chest pain or shortness of breath.
soapO: BP 150/95 mmHg, HR 82/min. No acute distress.
soapP: Start Lisinopril 10mg daily. Home BP monitoring. Follow-up in 4 weeks.

name: Spencer Acosta
soapS: Patient reports frequent urination, increased thirst, and fatigue over the past few weeks.
soapO: HbA1c 7.4%, fasting glucose 148 mg/dL. No acute distress.
soapP: Continue Metformin 500mg twice daily. Reinforce diet/exercise. Recheck HbA1c in 3 months.

name: Casey Bradshaw
soapS: Patient reports a persistent dry cough and wheezing, worse at night and in cold weather.
soapO: SpO2 97%, mild expiratory wheeze on exam. No acute distress.
soapP: Albuterol inhaler PRN. Add low-dose inhaled corticosteroid. Spirometry follow-up.

name: Nicholas Henderson
soapS: Patient reports heartburn and acid reflux, especially after meals.
soapO: Abdomen soft, non-tender; vitals stable. No acute distress.
soapP: Omeprazole 20mg daily before breakfast. Dietary modification, avoid late meals.
